description_long: This object is a compact, dark-colored firearm with a sleek, metallic finish and a streamlined profile. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with a slight curve for comfortable handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and proportionate to the grip. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, with a smooth exterior and no visible ribbing or venting. The upper receiver and slide are integrated, with subtle detailing and a few small protrusions for mechanical function. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some polymer or plastic components likely present in the grip.
description: A compact, dark metallic shotgun with a sleek, modern design and ergonomic grip. The object features a short, smooth barrel and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the slide and grip.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the ergonomic grip, and the rounded trigger guard, highlighting the streamlined design.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide and grip, with the barrel end not visible and the overall width of the object apparent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side of the barrel, grip, and trigger guard, with similar detailing.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth exterior, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
